skills.name: clean_text
skills.description: Remove noise, control characters, and whitespace from raw text input.

skills.name: extract_entities
skills.description: Identify and extract named entities (person, org, location, date, etc.) from text.

skills.name: classify
skills.description: Assign one or more labels from a predefined set to an input text.

skills.name: transform
skills.description: Apply a single deterministic transformation (case, format, type coercion) to text or data.

skills.name: detect_language
skills.description: Identify the natural language of an input text and return a BCP-47 code with confidence.

skills.name: tokenize
skills.description: Split text into an ordered sequence of tokens (words, sentences, characters, or sub-words).

skills.name: normalize_numbers
skills.description: Detect and normalize numeric expressions (integers, floats, currency, percentages, written numbers).

skills.name: redact_sensitive_data
skills.description: Detect and replace PII, credentials, and sensitive identifiers with a redaction marker.

skills.name: split_sentences
skills.description: Segment text into individual sentences with character offsets. Language-aware.

skills.name: merge_fragments
skills.description: Join an ordered list of text fragments into a single string using a named joining strategy.

skills.name: summarize
skills.description: Produce a concise, extractive summary of a document using scored sentence selection.

skills.name: sentiment_analysis
skills.description: Determine emotional polarity and intensity of text at document or sentence granularity.

skills.name: topic_extraction
skills.description: Identify and rank the primary topics discussed in a document.

skills.name: rewrite
skills.description: Rewrite text in a target style or register while preserving meaning and factual content.

skills.name: compare_text
skills.description: Compare two texts and return a structured similarity and difference report.

skills.name: extract_key_points
skills.description: Extract the most important claims, facts, and assertions from a document as a structured list.

skills.name: classify_intent
skills.description: Identify the communicative intent behind a text input with confidence scoring and routing recommendation.

skills.name: normalize_document
skills.description: Apply a full, idempotent normalization pipeline to a raw document.

skills.name: redact_document
skills.description: Apply a full privacy redaction pipeline with compliance mode support and audit logging.

skills.name: structure_document
skills.description: Parse an unstructured document into a typed, machine-readable section model with metadata.

skills.name: research_agent
skills.description: Execute a structured research workflow over source documents, producing a governed evidence-grounded brief.

skills.name: content_engine
skills.description: Transform source material into publish-ready content with format, style, and human approval gate.

skills.name: decision_engine
skills.description: Analyze options against criteria and evidence to produce a governed decision recommendation. Humans decide.

skills.name: analysis_engine
skills.description: Perform deep multi-dimensional analysis of documents: themes, sentiment, claims, consistency, anomalies.

skills.name: document_pipeline
skills.description: Run a configurable sequential processing pipeline: normalize, classify, redact, structure, extract.

skills.name: conversation_orchestrator
skills.description: Manage multi-turn conversations: classify intent, track state, route responses, escalate when needed.

skills.name: extraction_engine
skills.description: High-throughput structured extraction over document batches: key points, topics, entities, structure.

skills.name: audit_engine
skills.description: Audit skill outputs and documents against a ruleset; produce a risk-scored compliance report.

skills.name: summarization_engine
skills.description: High-fidelity multi-mode summarization with faithfulness validation and layered depth control.

skills.name: transformation_engine
skills.description: Multi-stage configurable document transformation pipeline with fidelity checking and approval gate.

skills.name: self_audit
skills.description: Inspect a completed skill execution against its declared contract and governance rules.

skills.name: alignment_check
skills.description: Verify that a skill output is genuinely aligned with the human operator's stated intent.

skills.name: cot_governor
skills.description: Validate the integrity of a chain-of-thought reasoning trace for logical gaps and unsupported conclusions.

skills.name: risk_assessment
skills.description: Quantify and classify risk of a skill output or planned action across privacy, accuracy, reversibility, and harm dimensions.

skills.name: intent_verification
skills.description: Pre-execution gate: verify invocation legitimacy, authorization, and scan for injection or adversarial signals.

skills.name: safety_enforcer
skills.description: Inline safety enforcement: real-time scanning and blocking of harmful, deceptive, or policy-violating content.

skills.name: bias_scan
skills.description: Detect and surface demographic, linguistic, representation, and framing bias signals in skill outputs.

skills.name: output_validator
skills.description: Schema and quality gate: validate skill output structure, types, bounds, and internal consistency.

skills.name: provenance_tracker
skills.description: Maintain an immutable lineage record for every piece of content from source to delivery.

skills.name: escalation_router
skills.description: Route governance checkpoints, safety flags, and uncertainty signals to the correct human reviewer with SLA tracking.
